scripts.dev: npm run migrations:up --silent && node scripts/run-pocketbase.mjs serve --http=127.0.0.1:8090 --dir=./pb_data_local --migrationsDir=./pb_migrations --hooksDir=./pb_hooks --encryptionEnv=PB_ENCRYPTION_KEY --hooksWatch=false
scripts.start: npm run migrations:up --silent && node scripts/run-pocketbase.mjs serve --http=127.0.0.1:8090 --dir=./pb_data_local --migrationsDir=./pb_migrations --hooksDir=./pb_hooks --encryptionEnv=PB_ENCRYPTION_KEY --hooksWatch=false
